definition.name: near-fixed-algebra
definition.definition: def-near-fixed-algebra (definitions/def-near-fixed-algebra.md): A=Im P=Ker(1-P) subset B(H)_sa, real subspace containing 1; for a in A, a=P(a). Projected Jordan product a•b:=P(a o b). Order, unit, order-unit norm inherited EXACTLY from B(H)_sa; B(H)_sa is a unital JB algebra (GT-bhsa-jc + GT-jc-is-jb).
